1.name: Search Links
1.description: Uses Amazon search URL (/s?k=product+name). Always works, never breaks. User lands on search results page — extra click to reach product.

2.name: Direct Product Links
2.description: Scrapes the actual ASIN from Amazon search results and builds a direct product link (/dp/ASIN). User lands directly on product page — higher conversion rate. May occasionally break if ASIN is delisted.
